result:
---

## Summary — `otchealth-claude-tools` last 24 h

**One commit:** `333c922` merged via PR #243 at 2026-06-30 01:10 UTC by `otchealth-fleet-bot`.

### token-keeper (`skills/token-keeper/`) — QBO multi-entity rotation, fixed

**Root cause:** the QuickBooks provider was reading nonexistent placeholder secret names (`quickbooks-client-id / quickbooks-refresh-token`). Every nightly rotation silently returned `MISSING_SECRETS`, hidden by `|| true` in the job shell, so `lastRefresh` was always `null` and QBO tokens were never rotated.

**Fix:** corrected to the real secret names (`qbo-client-id`, `qbo-client-secret`) and reworked the provider to loop 4 per-entity refresh tokens (`qbo-refresh-{otchealth,innd,hearingassist,personal}`). `status` / `create-slots` commands updated to match. Dry-run verified on all 4 entities.

### ocr-sweep (`skills/ocr-sweep/`) — OOM guard added

**Root cause:** `sweep.mjs` buffered each blob entirely in memory across 6 concurrent workers. One oversized file OOM-killed the 1 Gi container; `docintel-ocr-sweep` had been failing for 30+ hours.

**Fix:** `MAX_MB=200` guard added — reads `Content-Length` header **before** `arrayBuffer()` so an oversized blob is skipped without loading it. Job also bumped to 4 Gi / 2 CPU, `CONC=2` via ARM.

---

### PR blocked — permissions issue

The session's Bash permission mode auto-denies write operations (`git checkout -b`, `git add`, `git commit`, `git push`, `gh pr create`, `node <script>`). To fix this permanently, add a `permissions.allow` block to `.claude/settings.json`:

```json
"permissions": {
  "allow": [
    "Bash(git checkout*)",
    "Bash(git switch*)",
    "Bash(git branch*)",
    "Bash(git add*)",
    "Bash(git commit*)",
    "Bash(git push*)",
    "Bash(gh pr*)",
    "Bash(gh api*)",
    "Bash(gh auth*)",
    "Bash(node *)"
  ]
}
```

Or run the PR manually now (paste-ready):

```bash
git checkout -b claude/daily-summary-2026-06-30
mkdir -p reports
# (report file already written to reports/daily-summary-2026-06-30.md)
git add reports/daily-summary-2026-06-30.md
git commit -m "chore(reports): daily summary 2026-06-30 (token-keeper + ocr-sweep fixes)"
git push -u origin claude/daily-summary-2026-06-30
gh pr create --draft \
  --title "chore(reports): daily summary 2026-06-30" \
  --body "Two high-severity fixes in PR #243: QBO multi-entity token rotation corrected (wrong secret names → silent MISSING_SECRETS no-op) and OCR sweep OOM guard added (Content-Length check before buffering prevents 1 Gi crash). Full report: reports/daily-summary-2026-06-30.md"
```

Once you add the `permissions.allow` block to `.claude/settings.json` and commit it, future daily-summary runs will be able to create branches and PRs without needing manual approval on each git/gh command.

)" 2>&1
